headline: BNP Paribas Initiates Coverage On Johnson Controls Intl with Underperform Rating, Announces Price Target of $120
summary: BNP Paribas  analyst Andrew Buscaglia   initiates coverage on Johnson Controls Intl (NYSE:JCI) with a Underperform rating and announces Price Target of $120.

headline: Johnson Controls Data Challenges May Shape Demand For Building Tech Services
summary: Johnson Controls International (NYSE:JCI) released a new survey highlighting that most building operators already have workplace technology in place. The survey finds that integration gaps and limited use of generated data are major hurdles for operators. These issues are affecting renovation, construction, and energy management decisions across commercial properties. For investors tracking NYSE:JCI, this survey sheds light on how building technology is being used inside offices, campuses,...
